channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Understanding Cyclosporiasis: The Parasite Behind the Latest Outbreak
item.description: Health officials are investigating a multistate outbreak of this parasitic intestinal infection. Learn what it is, how it spreads, and symptoms to watch for.

item.title: Brain Foods That May Help Prevent Dementia
How to Identify Bugs and Their Bites
Can AI at the Bedside Finally Ease Clinician Burnout?
item.description: A recent shift in software engineering allows developers to build complex applications using natural language and high-level architecture, potentially reducing burnout.
